pi_items.source: setup_task.sh confirms this is the destination path for the copy
world_survey.gpkg field_observations table contains 8 rows (real iNaturalist observations)

privileged_info_summary: The data is a real-world subset of iNaturalist observations combined with world capital locations inside world_survey.gpkg. The gpkg_path, initial_count (8), expected_total_count (11), and target layer 'field_observations' exactly match the task parameters. However, there is a fatal bug in the task design: the task instructions tell the agent to add features with 'name' and 'notes' fields, and verifier.py executes 'SELECT name, notes, ST_X(geom), ST_Y(geom) FROM field_observations'. The 'field_observations' table does not have 'name' or 'notes' columns (it only has observer_name, species, location, obs_date, quality_grade), and ST_X/ST_Y functions are not available without loading the Spatialite extension. Therefore, any attempt to complete or verify this task will result in an SQLite operational error.
